$comment: Hand-curated overrides for data/splunkbase-catalog.json. The Splunkbase REST API does not always carry the canonical vendor name, the 'cloudVetted' bit, or a clean category — this file lets us correct those without losing the override on the next sync. Merge order: scripts/sync_splunkbase_catalog.py loads the base catalog, then applies this file on top (per-key shallow merge per app id, recursive merge for known nested fields). Keep entries minimal: only fields that diverge from upstream. The audit tools/audits/splunkbase_ids.py treats the overlay as authoritative.
